Interface DocumentationDocumentable

All Superinterfaces:
Documentable
All Known Subinterfaces:
BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event<E>, DefaultFunction<T>, DefaultSyntaxInfos.Expression<E,R>, DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure<E>, Experiment, SyntaxInfo<E>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnyInfo, AudienceClassInfo, BlockClassInfo, ClassInfo, EntityClassInfo, EnumClassInfo, ExpressionInfo, Feature, InventoryClassInfo, ItemStackClassInfo, ItemTypeClassInfo, JavaFunction, LocationClassInfo, NameableClassInfo, OfflinePlayerClassInfo, PlayerClassInfo, Property, QuaternionClassInfo, QueueClassInfo, RegistryClassInfo, ScriptClassInfo, SimpleJavaFunction, SkriptEventInfo, SkriptEventInfo.ModernSkriptEventInfo, SlotClassInfo, StructureInfo, SyntaxElementInfo, TestFeatures, TextComponentClassInfo, VectorClassInfo
public interface DocumentationDocumentable extends Documentable
A Documentable that has a retrievable Documentation.
